docket_entries.description: NOTICE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO ORANGE COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SAGA HOLDINGS, A CANADIAN CORPORATION SAGA MARINE, A CANADIAN BUSINESS ENTITY

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO ORANGE COUNTY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SAGA HOLDINGS, A CANADIAN CORPORATION SAGA MARINE, A CANADIAN BUSINESS ENTITY

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF GRAY, ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT ELY, BERNARD , AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT ELY, BERNARD , AN INDIVIDUAL RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT SAGA HOLDINGS, A CANADIAN CORPORATION SAGA MARINE, A CANADIAN BUSINESS ENTITY $66,586.25 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $66,586.25, ** (THIS JUDGMENT CONSISTING, PRINCIPAL AMOUNT : $65000, FILING FEE: $335 AND INTEREST AMOUNT: $1251.25, TOTAL: $66586.25), SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: WEIL, DAVID SUBSTITUTED FOR LUSCUTOFF, SIDNEY ALEX AS ATTORNEY FOR GRAY, ERIC
